picks.quote: I'd be more worried about the Tsarukyan fight because of what the real threat that he poses.
I desperately want to see it because I think if you if you go into a fight with Ilia Topuria with this kind of attitude, it's going to go super [ __ ] bad for you.
it's just hard to make the case that you could really convince someone that the guy that Max Holloway put face down... that Topuria couldn't get past him.
I would bet that it would close with Ilia as a slight underdog.
